canonical_answer: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair wears a black top and red patterned cardigan while standing in a kitchen area with white cabinets and a yellow wall. She speaks to the camera and gestures with her hands before holding a jar of chestnut cream and a package of biscuits. A yellow bowl sits on the counter, and a red checkered apron hangs on the wall nearby. The FIGARO LIVE logo appears in the top right corner.
